sub_modules.fp_mult_unpack: Combinational IEEE-754 operand unpacking, significand construction, sign generation, and zero/infinity/NaN detection.
sub_modules.fp_mult_special: Combinational special-case priority classification for NaN, invalid zero-times-infinity, infinity, and signed zero results.
sub_modules.fp_mult_mul_exp: Combinational 24x24 significand multiply and biased exponent addition with subnormal effective exponent handling.
sub_modules.fp_mult_normalize: Combinational product normalization with guard, round, and sticky bit extraction.
sub_modules.fp_mult_round: Combinational round-to-nearest-even for the normalized significand and exponent carry adjustment.
sub_modules.fp_mult_pack: Combinational IEEE-754 result packing with NaN, infinity, zero, overflow, normal, and flush-to-zero underflow handling.
